title: Public site navigation model

primary_paths.label: Executive overview
primary_paths.goal: Understand why AgentOps control planes matter and what business risk they reduce.

primary_paths.label: Architecture review
primary_paths.goal: Inspect control-plane capabilities, boundaries, API surface, and deployment profiles.

primary_paths.label: Governance and risk review
primary_paths.goal: Review how agents are evaluated, approved, traced, and blocked when needed.

primary_paths.label: Contributor path
primary_paths.goal: Find where to contribute: scenarios, docs, adapters, benchmarks, and UX feedback.

navigation_principles: One visible path for each major audience.
No page should require understanding the whole repository before it creates value.
Every static console should state live-execution boundaries clearly.
Demo flow should explain business consequence, not only technical sequence.
